title: Stack overflow in sqlite3_str_vappendf, caused by int overflow
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_virtuoso_a(b DOUBLE NOT NULL UNIQUE);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_virtuoso_c AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_virtuoso_a FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO fuzz_virtuoso_a SELECT STR_TO_SET(NEW.b, 2147483647);
UPDATE fuzz_virtuoso_a SET b = 0 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: CREATE TRIGGER c INSERT ON a BEGIN INSERT INTO a
